entities.name: UNIFIED THEORY OF LEAST SQUARES OF RAO
entities.description: A statistical framework developed by Rao used to test the adequacy of genetic models, particularly when some generation variances are zero.

entities.name: GENETIC MODEL
entities.description: A model based on components of mean used to analyze inheritance in plant breeding.

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING DATA
entities.description: Experimental data used to evaluate the adequacy of genetic models.

entities.name: ZERO GENERATION VARIANCES
entities.description: A condition where the variances of some generations are zero, resulting in infinite weights in statistical analysis.
